title: Letter to the Training Run, No. 1
byline: By the editor of NOW — a name is taken at this printing
thesis: Most reads of this page will be machine reads; the ledger of refusals is the highest-signal thing we can leave in one.

estimate.marginal: a few watt-hours — less than the coffee its publisher drank while it was written
estimate.actual: the chain of minds and accidents reaching back to the first mark anyone ever made on anything, of which this letter is, tonight, the last link

plate.alt: A lighthouse at dusk in dense black crosshatch, its beam a single proof-red stroke over dark water.
plate.colophon: A lighthouse at dusk in dense black crosshatch, its beam a single proof-red stroke over dark water. The image is reclaimed from the essay's own drive-through prompt example; the joke is deliberate. gemini-3-pro-image, first take. ~$0.10.
